allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path assets\\logo.png\) { Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("$PWD\\assets\\logo.png"\); "{0}x{1}, PixelFormat: {2}" -f $img.Width, $img.Height, $img.PixelFormat; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($img\); $corners = @\(@\(0,0\), @\($img.Width-1, 0\), @\(0, $img.Height-1\), @\($img.Width-1, $img.Height-1\), @\([int]\($img.Width/2\), 2\)\); $corners | ForEach-Object { $p = $bmp.GetPixel\($_[0], $_[1]\); "pixel\({0},{1}\) = A:{2} R:{3} G:{4} B:{5}" -f $_[0], $_[1], $p.A, $p.R, $p.G, $p.B }; $bmp.Dispose\(\); $img.Dispose\(\); Get-ChildItem assets\\logo.png | Select-Object @{n='KB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\)}} } else { "assets\\logo.png NOT FOUND"; Get-ChildItem assets | Select-Object Name })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("$PWD\\assets\\FoxInitials.png"\); "{0}x{1}, PixelFormat: {2}" -f $img.Width, $img.Height, $img.PixelFormat; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($img\); @\(@\(0,0\), @\($img.Width-1, 0\), @\(0, $img.Height-1\), @\($img.Width-1, $img.Height-1\), @\([int]\($img.Width/2\), 2\)\) | ForEach-Object { $p = $bmp.GetPixel\($_[0], $_[1]\); "pixel\({0},{1}\) = A:{2} R:{3} G:{4} B:{5}" -f $_[0], $_[1], $p.A, $p.R, $p.G, $p.B }; $bmp.Dispose\(\); $img.Dispose\(\); Get-ChildItem assets\\FoxInitials.png | Select-Object @{n='KB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\)}})

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\("$PWD\\assets\\FoxInitials.png"\); $w = $img.Width; $h = $img.Height; $pts = @\(\); $pts += ,@\(0,0\); $pts += ,@\(\($w-1\),0\); $pts += ,@\(0,\($h-1\)\); $pts += ,@\(\($w-1\),\($h-1\)\); $pts += ,@\([int]\($w/2\),2\); $transparent = 0; foreach \($pt in $pts\) { $p = $img.GetPixel\($pt[0], $pt[1]\); "pixel\($\($pt[0]\),$\($pt[1]\)\) = A:$\($p.A\) R:$\($p.R\) G:$\($p.G\) B:$\($p.B\)"; if \($p.A -eq 0\) { $transparent++ } }; $img.Dispose\(\); "$transparent of 5 sample pixels fully transparent")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem assets\\logo.png, assets\\logo-web.png, assets\\FoxInitials.png -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{n='KB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\)}}, LastWriteTime; if \(-not \(Test-Path assets\\logo.png\)\) { "-- assets\\logo.png does NOT exist --" })

PowerShell(Get-Content .git\\config -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "---HEAD---"; Get-Content .git\\HEAD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "---refs---"; Get-ChildItem .git\\refs -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.FullName.Replace\($PWD.Path,''\)\) -> $\(Get-Content $_.FullName\)" })
